name: allow-read-noncode
doc: The clean allow-path. A PreToolUse Read of a NON-code file passes every gate → empty stdout, exit 0 (pre-allow.ts allowOutcome:39 returns "" when no pass-notice/lesson fires; empty lessons + no design agent in $TMP). IMPORTANT: the target is a .md, not a code file — a Read of a *code* file would still hit apexScopedGate/freshnessGate (gate.ts:92 runs apexScopedGate for ANY tool when isApexScoped(filePath), and freshnessGate is tool-agnostic, apex-gates.ts:68-69). In production the core hook only wires Write|Edit so a Read never reaches this; the simulator sends the raw event, so we use a non-code path to stay unambiguously allowed.

steps.doc: Read README.md: isFileSizeScoped=false (file-size-scope.ts:12 excludes .md) and isApexScoped=false (gate-helpers.ts:23 CODE_EXT excludes .md) → evaluate allow → gate() null → allowOutcome empty.
